tasks.question: Resolve the issuer SEC CIK before primary filing collection.
tasks.evidence_required: Committed SEC ticker/CIK mapping or verified SEC submissions identity.
tasks.acceptance_test: Registry download.cik is a ten-digit verified CIK.

tasks.question: A complete primary-sourced component valuation has not been built.
tasks.evidence_required: normalized owner earnings; incremental return on capital; reinvestment runway; diluted share count; competitive-advantage mechanism
tasks.acceptance_test: Every material economic claim is valued exactly once with causal low/base/high assumptions and primary evidence.
